query:
SELECT 
  contratos.corretorId,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  COALESCE(SUM(contratos.valorVenda), 0) as vgv
FROM contratos
GROUP BY contratos.corretorId
HAVING contratos.corretorId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Guilherme%Nunes%'
);
